zh.Stichill, The Scottish Borders, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill於1345年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾斯鐵爾時，他的父親Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill51歲，母親Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill13歲。他於大約1374年與Annie McCartney在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1402年9月14日在英國諾圖波藍德享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill于1345年出生在苏格兰洛包爾斯鐵爾时，他的父亲Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill51岁，母亲Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill13岁。他于大约1374年与Annie McCartney在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯斯鐵爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1402年9月14日在英国諾圖波藍德享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill was born in 1345, in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill, was 51 and his mother, Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill, was 13. He married Annie McCartney about 1374, in Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 14 September 1402, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill est né en 1345, à Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Annie McCartney environ 1374, à Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1402, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill 1345 in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill 51 und seine Mutter Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill 13. Er hat um 1374 in Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom Annie McCartney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 14. September 1402 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill è nato il nel 1345 nel Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Annie McCartney circa 1374, nel Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 14 settembre 1402, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichillが1345年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアスティトチルで生まれた時，父Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichillは51歳，母Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichillは13歳であった。約1374年にイギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダーススティトチルでAnnie McCartneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1402年9月14日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill(이)가 1345년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 스티트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1374년 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 스티트치에서 Annie McCartney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1402년 9월 14일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 킬마노c크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill nasceu em 1345, em Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Annie McCartney aproximadamente 1374, em Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1402, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill родился в 1345 г. в местности стичилл, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Annie McCartney около 1374 г. в местности стичилл, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 14 сентября 1402 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Gordon 2nd Laird of Stichill nació en 1345, en Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Annie McCartney aproximadamente 1374, en Stitchill, Scottish Borders, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1402, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
